topics.label: Carbon Explorer
topics.description: Try Carbon in the online explorer. Carbon is experimental — not production-ready yet.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: var x: i32, let for immutable. Explicit types with familiar syntax.

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: fn keyword with typed parameters and return types.

topics.label: Classes & Interfaces
topics.description: class for types, interface for contracts. Designed to interop with C++.

topics.label: Generics
topics.description: Checked generics with compile-time type checking. Safer than C++ templates.

topics.label: Memory Safety
topics.description: Designed for memory safety with bounds checking and lifetime analysis.

topics.label: C++ Interop
topics.description: Seamless interoperability with existing C++ code. Carbon's primary goal.
